questions.question: Which statement best describes Innate immunity?
questions.option_a: T-cell mediated delayed-type hypersensitivity
questions.option_b: Induces protective adaptive immune memory
questions.option_c: Rapid, non-specific defense (e.g., barriers, phagocytes, complement)
questions.option_d: Antigen-specific response mediated by T and B lymphocytes with memory
questions.explanation: Responds quickly; lacks antigen-specific memory.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Adaptive immunity?
questions.option_a: Presents exogenous peptides to CD4+ T cells
questions.option_b: Immune complex-mediated inflammation
questions.option_c: T-cell mediated delayed-type hypersensitivity
questions.option_d: Antigen-specific response mediated by T and B lymphocytes with memory
questions.explanation: Slower onset; immunologic memory and specificity.

questions.question: Which statement best describes MHC class I?
